ModMetaData.name: Void Shelf
ModMetaData.author: Sanicek
ModMetaData.description:
The Void Shelf is a normal storage building with the usual storage filter and priority settings. It begins with an empty filter and Low priority, so choose what it accepts before hauling items to it.
On its periodic rare tick, the shelf permanently destroys every item it holds. There may be a short delay after hauling, then clutter fades into oblivion. The shelf discriminates not.
WARNING: Destruction is permanent. A mistaken filter can destroy valuable items, and nothing placed on the shelf can be recovered once the void takes it.
Created to remove unwanted Combat Extended ammunition clutter, though Combat Extended is not required.
MIT licensed. Parts of the code, documentation, and maintenance used AI-tool assistance; published changes are reviewed and tested by the maintainer.
https://github.com/sanicek/rw-void-shelf
